ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Passion fruit, flesh without skin, with seeds, raw

ingredients_text: Fat Free Natural Yoghurt Fermented with Kefir Cultures (86%), (Pasteurised Skimmed Milk, Water, Skimmed Milk Powder, Live Kefir Cultures), Passion Fruit Juice (10%), Sugar (4%).
